# Enkrateia — llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-05-21

## Product
Enkrateia is a 90-day iOS app for reducing compulsive social media use.
It uses Apple Family Controls for OS-level blocking and phase-based behavior change.
Platform: iOS only.

## Pricing
- Founding member pre-order access: $21 one-time (opening sale)
- Standard launch pricing: pending final App Store configuration

## Program structure
- Phase 1 (Days 1-30): Full blocking, no standard unlock path
- Phase 2 (Days 31-60): Daily intentional access choice gate
- Phase 3 (Days 61-90): Time-limited access with progress feedback

## Core features
- Morning declaration and evening check-in
- Craving curve, hour heatmap, and weekly report card
- Accountability partner notifications
- Day 1 future-self letter delivered at graduation

## Privacy and security
- Journal encryption: AES-256-GCM
- Per-device encryption key stored in iOS secure storage
- Blocked app names are not uploaded by the native Family Controls pipeline
- User account deletion is available in-app

## Canonical URLs
- https://enkrateiaonline.com/
- https://enkrateiaonline.com/privacy.html
- https://enkrateiaonline.com/terms.html

## Contact
- support@enkrateiaonline.com
- privacy@enkrateiaonline.com
